package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for event_publish_before_transaction_commit: Event or message publication before durable commit is confirmed.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule031NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule031NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule031NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario031Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule031NegativeService, input Rule031NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
